2605.15177.title: OpenDeepThink: Parallel Reasoning via Bradley--Terry Aggregation
2605.15177.paper_summary: Test-time compute scaling is a primary axis for improving LLM reasoning. Existing methods primarily scale depth by extending a single reasoning trace. Scaling breadth by sampling multiple candidates in parallel is straightforward, but introduces a selection bottleneck: choosing the best candidate without a ground-truth verifier, since pointwise LLM judging is noisy and biased. To address this, we introduce OpenDeepThink, a population-based test-time compute framework that selects via pairwise Bradley-Terry comparison. Each generation, the LLM judges random pairs of candidates and aggregates votes via Bradley-Terry into a global ranking; top-ranked candidates are preserved and the top three quarters are mutated using the natural-language critiques produced during comparison; the bottom quarter is discarded. OpenDeepThink raises Gemini 3.1 Pro's effective Codeforces Elo by +405 points in eight sequential LLM-call rounds (~27 minutes wall-clock). The pipeline transfers across weaker and stronger models without retuning, and on the multi-domain HLE benchmark, gains appear concentrated in objectively verifiable domains and reverse in subjective ones. We release CF-73, a curated set of 73 expert-rated Codeforces problems with International Grandmaster annotation and 99% local-evaluation agreement against the official verdict.
2605.15177.paper_summary_zh: 測試時計算擴展是改善 LLM 推理的主要方向。現有的方法主要通過延伸單一推理軌跡來擴展深度。通過並行抽樣多個候選者來擴展廣度是直接的，但引入了一個選擇瓶頸：在沒有真實驗證者的情況下選擇最佳候選者，因為逐點 LLM 判斷是嘈雜且有偏見的。為了解決這個問題，我們引入了 OpenDeepThink，一個基於人群的測試時計算框架，通過成對的 Bradley-Terry 比較進行選擇。每一代，LLM 評估隨機的候選者對並通過 Bradley-Terry 聚合投票形成全球排名；排名最高的候選者被保留，排名前四分之三的候選者使用比較過程中產生的自然語言評價進行變異；底部四分之一則被丟棄。OpenDeepThink 將 Gemini 3.1 Pro 的有效 Codeforces Elo 提升了 405 分，在八輪連續的 LLM 調用中（約 27 分鐘的實時計時）。該管道可以在較弱和較強的模型之間轉移而無需重新調整，並且在多領域 HLE 基準上，增益似乎集中在客觀可驗證的領域，而在主觀領域則出現反向效果。我們發布了 CF-73，一組經過精心策劃的 73 個專家評分的 Codeforces 問題，附有國際大師註解，並且與官方裁決的本地評估一致性達到 99%。
2605.15177.author: Shang Zhou et.al.
2605.15177.authors: Shang Zhou, Wenhao Chai, Kaiyuan Liu, Huanzhi Mao, Qiuyang Mang, Jingbo Shang
